titleEn: Stop Chasing AGI; The Core of This AI Wave is Process Revolution

title: 大英百科全书起诉 OpenAI：你写答案，为什么把我的名字写在上面？
description: AI之战终于达到了“归属权”的层面。
titleZh: 大英百科全书起诉 OpenAI：你写答案，为什么把我的名字写在上面？
titleEn: Encyclopædia Britannica Sues OpenAI: You Write the Answers, Why Put My Name on Them?
descriptionZh: AI之战终于达到了“归属权”的层面。
descriptionEn: The AI war has finally reached the level of "attribution rights." This case is already arguing: can the answers bear my name? In this sense, Encyclopædia Britannica's lawsuit against OpenAI is not just a copyright protection case. It's more like a counterattack by traditional knowledge institutions against the "order of sources" in the AI era.
